title: All4Labels - Global Packaging Group ransomware incident

extortion.description: All4Labels, headquartered in Hamburg, is one of the world’s top label manufacturers and the leading provider of digital printing solutions with a specialization on the home and personal care as well as food & beverage markets. We are ready to upload more than 192 GB of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, etc.
